spec_match.rationale: Uses a probe element to measure and verify the CSS environment variable in real time.

interactive.rationale: Includes a real simulator slider to dynamically scale the sample card and demonstrate the layout adjustment.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligns with the feature's core premise of respecting user-level OS font settings.

edge_cases.rationale: Features robust support detection with a simulated fallback for browsers or systems that don't expose the variable.

references.rationale: Cites the correct chromestatus entry and spec link.

design_system.rationale: Perfectly adheres to the design system CSS variables and custom styling patterns.

summary: This concept successfully showcases env(preferred-text-scale) by checking if the CSS supports the environment variable, computing the live value via a probe element, and offering a simulator slider to demonstrate its utility.
